title: Jimbo's Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by price manipulation on Arbitrum

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls shift() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls shift() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
summary: Jimbo's Protocol suffered a flash loan attack where the attacker manipulated the price of JIMBO tokens, leading to a loss of over $7.5M. A guard could have blocked transactions calling shift() immediately after a flash loan.
